Dear Juhi
A love letter from the one who can't stop thinking about you
🌹
↓
🌹 For You 🌹

These roses can't match your beauty,
but they're the closest thing in this world that tries.

✦ ✦ ✦
You, Always Beautiful 📸
My favourite person 🌸
Pink suits you 💕
So graceful ✨
✦ ✦ ✦
My world 🌍
Even angry, you're gorgeous 😍
My heart 💓
✦ ✦ ✦
Her Maa — My Everything ❤️

Juhi, teri Maa tere liye sab kuch hai — aur isliye woh mere liye bhi sab kuch hain. Unki smile mein teri jhalak dikhti hai. Unka aashirwaad hi tera strength hai.

❤️ Maa — My Everything

Maa ki dua mein hi teri khushi hai 🙏
May she always be healthy and happy — always. 🌸

✦ ✦ ✦
Us 🥺💕
Our favorite eatery 🍽️
My favourite memory 💫
Us 🥰
Hold on to us 💞
My everything 🌹
✦ ✦ ✦
From My Heart 💌
💕

Juhi, main jab bhi tujhe dekhta hoon, sab kuch sahi lag jaata hai. Tu meri subah ki pehli khushi hai, aur raat ki akhri dua. Tujhse naraaz hona bhi mujhe toota hua feel karaata hai — kyunki mere world ka center tu hai. Main sorry hoon for everything that hurt you.

💘 Dil se
😂

Tu itni zyada gusse mein hai ke agar ye website dekhe toh probably delete button dhundhegi. Par thankfully websites mein delete button nahi hota — thodi aur problem hai tere liye! 😂 (Aur meri problem yeh hai ke main tere bina khana bhi theek se nahi khata — paratha bhi sad lagta hai! 🫓)

😜 Hasi aane wali baat
🌹

Teri aankhon mein jo duniya hai, teri smile mein jo roshni hai — woh sirf mere liye hai. Ya shayad nahi, par main toh yahi maanta hoon. Tujhe manana meri life ka sabse important kaam hai. Aur main haarne wala nahi.

💖 Sachchi baat
🤣

Seriously Juhi, ek website banai tere liye. Matlab soch — log flowers laate hain, chocolate laate hain. Main HTML aur CSS le aaya hoon. Programmer boyfriend ka yahi romance hota hai. Ab bol, kya main best hoon ya nahi? 😂💻

😂 Ekdum sach
😞

Kabhi kabhi darr lagta hai ke teri khamoshi permanent ho jaayegi. Ke ek din main message karunga aur koi reply nahi aayega — not because you're busy, but because you've decided to move on. Uss din ke baare mein sochta hoon toh saans rukne lagti hai. Please mat ja, Juhi.

💔 Dil ki baat
🙏

Tujhe maaf karna aata hai — mujhe pata hai. Aur main teri maafi ka haqdar hoon ya nahi, yeh tujhe decide karna hai. But this I know — there is no version of my life that is better without you in it. Please give us one more chance.

❤️ Always yours
✦ ✦ ✦
Our Paratha Date 🫓

Even the paratha tasted like happiness when you were sitting across from me. 🥺

💖
Juhi, this website is my heart on a screen.
Every photo, every word, every pixel — it's all you.

Please reply. Please let me make it right.

I love you — more than words, more than code,
more than anything I know how to say.
📱 Ek Message Bhejo 🌹

Made with 💕 by someone who loves you very much
